title: actions & things
body:
# Actions & Things:

![built on hdp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0eab358a818a87026e5590e6841fd6be1a7aee2f_0.webp)

_A Minecraft modpack inspired by the Bedrock "Actions & Stuff" project_

This modpack brings together carefully selected mods and resource packs to recreate and expand upon the concept of the popular Bedrock add-on in Java Edition.

## Key Features:
- Recreates the "Actions & Stuff" experience in Java.

- Additional quality-of-life improvements.

- Regular updates and expansions planned.

**⚠ Disclaimer: This is a fan-made project not affiliated with the original Bedrock creation. All credit for original concepts goes to their respective creators.**

Follow this page for updates as we continue to improve the modpack!
